about.short: Computer Science undergraduate (AI & ML, 2026) with strong hands-on experience in frontend development and building responsive, user-centric web applications. Skilled in HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap, with working knowledge of PHP and backend integration. Passionate about creating seamless user experiences and translating ideas into interactive web interfaces.
about.detailed:
I am a Computer Science Engineering student specializing in Artificial Intelligence and Machine Learning, currently pursuing my B.Tech. I enjoy designing and developing responsive, user-friendly web applications by combining strong problem-solving skills with modern frontend technologies.

I have built and deployed multiple projects including a real-time Air Quality Dashboard and a full-stack donation platform, where I focused on creating intuitive user interfaces using HTML, CSS, JavaScript, and Bootstrap, along with integrating backend services using Node.js and REST APIs. I also have working knowledge of PHP for handling form data and basic backend operations.

During a college-level hackathon, I led a team and secured 1st Prize for innovation and social impact, where I contributed significantly to frontend design and overall application usability.

Beyond academics, I actively participate in hackathons and technical events such as Smart India Hackathon and AI HackDays by Tech Mahindra, which have strengthened my ability to build real-world solutions, collaborate effectively, and deliver under pressure.

I am highly interested in frontend development and continuously work on improving my skills in creating responsive designs, optimizing user experience, and building scalable web applications.
